purpose: Score research packets before they are used by HoloBuild.

criteria.label: Question Quality
criteria.definition: Identifies high-value, solvable questions that matter to the domain decision rather than merely listing obvious topics.

criteria.label: Source Discovery
criteria.definition: Finds or extracts strong source classes, data, factual anchors, and counter-sources within the allowed budget.

criteria.label: Source Discipline
criteria.definition: Tracks provenance, access context, source limits, rejected sources, and unsupported claims without laundering inference as fact.

criteria.label: Adversarial Pressure
criteria.definition: Actively attacks assumptions, weak evidence, causal jumps, missing stakeholders, and practitioner objections.

criteria.label: Contradiction Handling
criteria.definition: Finds meaningful contradictions, maps what they change, and distinguishes resolved, partially resolved, and open conflicts.

criteria.label: Insight Generation
criteria.definition: Produces fresh, decision-relevant insight from evidence collisions rather than generic summary.

criteria.label: Builder Utility
criteria.definition: Hands HoloBuild clear implications, use-or-avoid guidance, claim boundaries, and the materials needed to produce a stronger artifact.

criteria.label: Auditability
criteria.definition: Preserves enough structure for another reviewer to understand what was asked, searched, found, rejected, inferred, and left open.

automatic_flags: missing rejected-source rationale when confidence depends on source exclusion
research packet contains final-artifact prose instead of research handoff
